---
name: Substantive change
about: Propose a change to normative requirements, defined URIs, JSON structures, or security/privacy assertions
title: "[Substantive] "
labels: ["substantive", "needs-review"]
---

## Specification and section

Which spec (OPI-EPS, OPI-PD, OPI-TRUST) and which section number does this affect? If it affects more than one, list all.

## Current text or behavior

Quote the current text verbatim, or describe the current behavior.

## Proposed change

What should change? If you have proposed replacement text, include it here in a blockquote or fenced block.

## Rationale

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve, and who is it a problem for?

## Interactions

Does this change interact with any other OPI specification, any external standard (RFC, W3C, FHIR, ISO, and similar), or any known implementation? List the interactions.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you weigh, and why did you pick this one?

## Conflicts of interest

Do you have a commercial or employment interest that would be affected by the outcome of this change? If so, disclose it here. If not, write "None."

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md.
- [ ] I have searched open and closed issues for duplicates.
- [ ] I understand that substantive changes require a minimum 7-day public comment window before a corresponding pull request can be merged.
